mapper.sql: select session_id, root_paper_id, user_id, start_time, submit_time, session_status, total_score, correct_rate, focus_loss_count, flagged_count, analysis_json from sc_exam_session
mapper.insert: insert into sc_exam_session(root_paper_id, user_id, start_time, submit_time, session_status, total_score, correct_rate, focus_loss_count, flagged_count, analysis_json, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{rootPaperId}, #{userId}, #{startTime}, #{submitTime}, #{sessionStatus}, #{totalScore}, #{correctRate}, #{focusLossCount}, #{flaggedCount}, #{analysisJson}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
